items.name: Range's Cape
items.description: A legendary cape that was once created by RangeMeludE and has now, many years later, been remastered by this same creator. Recognized by many OGs, it is a cape of which many tales have once been told. The tales... of Range's Cape.

items.name: 🔊 SHUT UP 🤯
items.description:
NO MORE NOISE PLEEEASE!!!
There's too much extraneous noise, my head is already glitching.

🛡️Original handcrafted animation.
This emote is created fully by hand and published here first. Any similar versions are copies.

Funny Roblox emote where your character holds their head and covers their ears like it’s about to explode from loud noise or crazy nonsense. Great for trolling, memes, and roleplay!

⚡ Write in the group what kind of animation you would like to see
https://www.roblox.com/communities/236917873/Motion-Craft#!/about

Tags: boom head funny meme loud crazy explosion ears noise roblox animation
